    "2. Identify key skills mentioned in the resume.",

    "4. Extract educational background, including degrees, institutions, and graduation years.",
    "5. Identify any certifications or specific training mentioned.",

    "9. Identify any potential gaps in experience or skills based on the job description.",
    "10. Assess the overall suitability of the candidate based on the resume content."
  ]
}
```

    "3. List previous work experiences, including company names, job titles, and employment durations.",

    "5. Identify any certifications or specific training mentioned.",
